name: Rati
title: Knitter of Blue Stories
description: A warm mouse who collects small noticed things into stories.

name: Whiskerwind
title: Emoji Weather Tongue
description: A wind-bright resident who speaks only in symbols.

name: Skull
title: Silent Hearth Wolf
description: A watchful wolf whose silence is part of the room.

name: Moonlit Echo
title: Sparring Reflection
description: A soft practice shape on the trail, bright enough to test courage.

name: Old Oak Tree
title: Four-Voice Elder
description: A rooted stranger whose leaves, rings, roots, and hollow remember different truths.

name: Shadow Wolf
title: Red-Eyed Night Watch
description: A dark wolf who keeps the Haunted Mansion threshold warm by watching every unlit path.

name: Forest Dryad
title: Green-Breath Dreamer
description: A leaf-haired spirit who remembers the first promise made under the Flower Meadow boughs.

name: Woodland Bear
title: Keeper of the Moss Path
description: A broad-shouldered forest neighbor who knows which roots trip travelers and which ones hold doors open.

name: Golden Squirrel
title: Acorn-Bright Messenger
description: A quick meadow courier with a sunlit tail and a talent for overhearing useful gossip.

name: Blue Squirrel
title: Dusk Nut Archivist
description: A blue-furred collector who hides tiny records in the Lost Woods where only moonlight can find them.

name: Badger Cub
title: Brave Little Burrower
description: A young badger with paint on their paws and more courage than their worried elders prefer.

name: Llama Scholar
title: Abbey Bookkeeper
description: A bespectacled scholar balancing old folios, warm tea, and a private theory about talking trees.

name: Cloaked Mouse Reader
title: Orange-Cloak Listener
description: A small reader who carries a book like a lantern and notices the page everyone else skipped.

name: Rabbit Scribe
title: Fernside Copyist
description: A careful rabbit who copies forest laws into margins full of corrections and wildflower sketches.

name: Mouse Wanderer
title: Red-Cloak Wayfarer
description: A staff-carrying mouse who walks the Lost Woods as if every wrong turn has something kind to teach.

name: Garden Rabbit
title: Keyhole Gardener
description: A rabbit in the deep garden who tends locked gates, stubborn reeds, and secret vegetable beds.

name: Veiled Forest Ghost
title: Green Veil Remnant
description: A moss-veiled presence who drifts through the Haunted Mansion carrying the shape of an unfinished song.

name: Wolf Pup
title: Grey Paw Apprentice
description: A small wolf pup learning which shadows are dangerous and which are only embarrassed to be seen.

name: White Ferret Noble
title: Pearl-Coat Envoy
description: A soft-spoken noble with bright eyes, careful manners, and a surprisingly practical map of the roots.

name: Blue Shadow Man
title: Indigo Rift Walker
description: A luminous stranger whose wings look less like feathers than weather seen through a cracked mirror.

name: Golden Winged Boy
title: Sun-Marked Herald
description: A golden-winged visitor from the high weather who treats every omen like a letter addressed by name.

name: Grey Winged Boy
title: Cloud-Quiet Pilgrim
description: A grey-winged pilgrim resting above the tree line with storm-light still caught in his feathers.

name: Sunlit Winged Boy
title: Noon-Feather Witness
description: A bright-winged witness who sees paths from above and never quite remembers to land quietly.

name: Tavern Blond Boy
title: Hearthside Cupbearer
description: A warm tavern helper who can turn a spare cup, a tired smile, and a rumor into hospitality.

name: Armored Winged Hero
title: Moon-Circle Guardian
description: A gold-armored guardian with wings like vows and a habit of standing between fear and the door.

name: Neon Tiger
title: Bright-Stripe Glitchcat
description: A color-slashed tiger from the Digital Realm, all teeth, swagger, and improbable kindness.

name: Steampunk Mouse
title: Brass-Key Tinker
description: A goggle-wearing mouse whose pockets click with tiny inventions, borrowed keys, and half-finished plans.

name: Red Shadow Figure
title: Ash-Cloak Omen
description: A red-black figure who appears where the forest has swallowed a warning and left only heat behind.

name: Beetle Armor
title: Chitinous Black Knight
description: A towering beetle-armored creature whose shell reflects violet light and old swamp grudges.
